seoTitle: Maryland vs Marys Mount — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maryland and Marys Mount. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maryland vs Marys Mount: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maryland and Marys Mount.
heading: Maryland vs Marys Mount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maryland, New South Wales and Marys Mount, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maryland has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Marys Mount (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maryland or Marys Mount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maryland has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Marys Mount scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maryland scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Marys Mount scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maryland or Marys Mount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maryland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
